ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the artist */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "track_href" TEXT /* URL to the track's metadata */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., audio_features) */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Spotify URI for the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track (0-100) */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) for the track */,
  "external_urls" TEXT /* JSON object storing external URLs related to the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Measure of how acoustic the track is */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of how suitable the track is for dancing */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Measure of how instrumental the track is */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, C=0, C#=1, etc.) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of how live the track is */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0=minor, 1=major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of how much spoken word is in the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* BPM (beats per minute) of the track */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of how positive the track is */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the time signature detection */,
  "durational_variability" REAL /* Variability in the duration of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the artist's primary genre */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist (0-100) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "artist_type" TEXT /* Type of artist (e.g., solo, band) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist, if applicable */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "external_urls" TEXT /* JSON object storing external URLs related to the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the artist */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's image */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., album, single, compilation) */,
  "copyright_text" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "external_urls" TEXT /* JSON object storing external URLs related to the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the parent genre */,
  "sub_genres" TEXT /* Array of sub-genres */,
  "example_tracks" TEXT /* Array of example track IDs for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* Array of preferred languages */,
  "external_urls" TEXT /* JSON object storing external URLs related to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Array of preferred genres */,
  "preferred_artists" TEXT /* Array of preferred artists */,
  "preferred_tracks" TEXT /* Array of preferred tracks */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if notifications are enabled */,
  "preferred_genres_confidence" TEXT /* Array of confidence levels for each preferred genre */,
  "preferred_artists_confidence" TEXT /* Array of confidence levels for each preferred artist */,
  "preferred_tracks_confidence" TEXT /* Array of confidence levels for each preferred track */,
  "music_mood_preferences" TEXT /* Array of preferred music moods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_listening_history" (
  "history_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "played_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was played */,
  "duration_listened_ms" INTEGER /* Duration the user listened to the track in milliseconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for listening */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the track was played */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Context in which the track was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_type" TEXT /* Type of playlist (e.g., personal, collaborative) */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Array of user IDs who are collaborators on the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user who added the track */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the playlist */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track is marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_hierarchy" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role */,
  "role_color" TEXT /* Color code for the role (for UI purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned to the user */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the role assignment */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
